category_sources: Official MediaArea BWF MetaEdit page describes Broadcast WAVE metadata embedding, validation, export, and reports.
source_facts.description says BWF MetaEdit embeds, validates, and exports BWF file metadata.
display_name_sources: Official MediaArea page and repository use BWF MetaEdit.
source_facts.description uses BWF file metadata; source_facts.name is bwfmetaedit.
docs_sources: Official MediaArea BWF MetaEdit page includes feature, metadata-standard, view, and workflow documentation.
repo_sources: Official MediaArea page links the project changelog to GitHub, and the official MediaArea/BWFMetaEdit repository documents clone/build instructions.
tags_sources: Official MediaArea page lists WAVE audio metadata, FADGI, validation, checksums, and reporting features.
source_facts.description identifies BWF metadata embedding, validation, and export.
